name: Quick Spinach Salad with Sprouts
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim, wash and dry spinach. Tear into bite-sized pieces to make about 10 cups, lightly packed.
2. Place in salad bowl. Add alfalfa sprouts, cheese and sunflower seeds.
3. In a small measuring cup, bowl or jar with screw top, combine oil, lemon juice, water, garlic, mustard, salt and pepper. Mix well.
Note: Cubed skim-milk mozzarella cheese can be used instead of crumbled Feta cheese. Rice vinegar, cider vinegar or balsamic vinegar can be used instead of lemon juice.
